modules.name: Base64
modules.description: Launchpad Mini MkII connection hub. Attach page modules to the right.

modules.name: Buttons64
modules.description: 64 toggle or momentary buttons mapped to the Launchpad grid. 4 × 16-channel polyphonic gate outputs.

modules.name: Grid64
modules.description: 64 toggle or momentary buttons mapped to the Launchpad grid. 64 individual mono gate outputs.

modules.name: Sliders64
modules.description: 8 slewed CV sliders mapped to Launchpad columns. Scene buttons select slew rate. 8 mono CV outputs.

modules.name: Flin64
modules.description: Polyrhythm ray machine. 8 independent cyclic trigger voices with variable speed and length. 8 mono + 1 poly gate outputs.

modules.name: Step64
modules.description: Classic 8-step sequencer. 7 gate rows with toggle steps, variable active length, flashing step indicator. 7 mono + 1 poly gate outputs, step CV.

modules.name: Cafe64
modules.description: Polyrhythm performance sequencer inspired by Press Cafe. 8 rhythm patterns, 8 independent voices, 3 sub-pages: play, rhythm editor, length editor. 8 mono + 1 poly trigger outputs.

modules.name: Gome64
modules.description: 2D pattern arpeggiator inspired by monome gome. Press a grid cell as the root; a pattern of relative offsets walks across the grid each clock tick. 8 selectable patterns, record mode, loop/latch. 4 × 16-channel polyphonic cell-gate outputs.

modules.name: 64Notes
modules.description: Note mapper and voice allocator for 64-cell gate sources (Gome64, Buttons64). 4 pitch arrangements, scales, chords, voice stealing. Polyphonic pitch, gate and retrigger outputs.

modules.name: Euclid64
modules.description: Euclidean rhythm sequencer. 8 columns = 8 voices; tap to set fill, two-button gesture sets length + fill, scene buttons mute. 8 mono + 1 poly trigger outputs.

modules.name: Bounce64
modules.description: Bouncing-ball rhythm machine (Tenori-on bounce mode). Drop a ball per column; it triggers on every floor hit, drop height sets the period. Scene buttons mute. 8 mono + 1 poly trigger outputs.

modules.name: Mlr64
modules.description: Performance sample cutter after mlr. 8 sample lanes, 8 slices; press to jump, varispeed-synced to the Base64 clock. Group stops, pattern recorders. Stereo mix + 8ch poly outputs.

modules.name: Life64
modules.description: Conway's Game of Life on the grid. Clock steps generations, pads toggle cells; freeze, randomize, frame looping, pattern library. 4 × 16-channel cell gates, row/column binary CVs, density CV.

modules.name: Sequencer64
modules.description: Clocked CV sequencer with slider-style steps: each column holds a 0-10V value, the clock walks the loop. Scene-A control strip for jumps and loop range, optional slew. CV, trigger and 8ch poly outputs.

modules.name: Inertia64
modules.description: 8 masses with inertia: top rows push up, bottom rows push down, position wraps modulo the grid, per-lane mono/bidirectional and friction. Scene handbrakes. Position ramp and signed velocity poly outputs.

modules.name: 8Notes
modules.description: Scale pitch source for the 8-voice page modules: channel n of the poly gate input maps to scale degree n. Poly pitch + pass-through gate outputs.
